articles.title: The mayor of Reno appears to be a LINK Marine
articles.description: It would seem that Mayor Hillary Schieve of Reno, Nevada is a supporter of Chainlink's blockchain oracle project.

articles.title: SEC’s XRP-Related Lawsuit Did Not Stop Ripple Form Signing Up 15 New Customers
articles.description: Blockchain payments firm Ripple has kept on adding new clients, even after the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced a lawsuit against the firm and two of its executives alleging they raised “raised over $1.3 billion through an unregistered, ongoing digital asset securities offering” referring to XRP. Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse revealed on social […]
